Synthesis Report (Round 1, ref:40b50cd2):

## Executive Summary
Multi-agent analysis yields cautiously optimistic assessment. Research identifies 30-45% efficiency gains; critique flags methodological limitations and bias risks; strategy resolves tensions through phased deployment.

## Key Findings
1. Evidence supports efficacy in controlled settings, generalizability unproven.
2. Bias and equity concerns require proactive fairness auditing.
3. Regulatory landscape evolving, requires continuous
